instructions.stateAccess: Use MCP GitHub tools or gh CLI to read/write state on autopilot-state branch
instructions.lockProtocol: Acquire lock via state file creation, check for existing lock first
instructions.releaseProtocol: Read workspace.json for repo config, never hardcode repos or paths
instructions.handoffProtocol: Create handoff JSON in workspace handoffs/ dir, set toAgent field
instructions.auditProtocol: Append audit entry after every state-mutating operation
